restaurants.name: Cô Lạc
restaurants.address: 234 E 4th St, New York, NY 10009, USA
restaurants.note: Chef Helen Nguyen (Saigon Social). $55 set menu, bánh dumplings, dry-aged duck. Grub Street April pick.

restaurants.name: TBD Gimbap
restaurants.address: 31 Carmine St, New York, NY 10014, USA
restaurants.note: Nami Nori team pop-up. Lines forming before open sign flips. Takeout gimbap ~$12. Runs through May+.

restaurants.name: Beto's Carnitas & Guisados
restaurants.address: 69 Clinton St Store front A, New York, NY 10002, USA
restaurants.note: Daily carnitas in steel cauldron. Guisados, gorditas with heirloom Masienda corn. Grub Street pick.

restaurants.name: 100 Feast & Lounge
restaurants.address: 100 E Broadway fl 2, New York, NY 10002, USA
restaurants.note: Second-story dim sum with roving carts. Opened mid-March on competitive E. Broadway corridor.

restaurants.name: L'Industrie Pizzeria - Little Italy
restaurants.address: 197 Grand St, New York, NY 10013, USA
restaurants.note: Third location of beloved Williamsburg slice shop. Standing room only. Opened March 19.

restaurants.name: What The Falafel
restaurants.address: 124 MacDougal St, New York, NY 10012, USA
restaurants.note: Ithaca's all-vegetarian fast-casual. Goop-endorsed tahini shakes, fresh pita. First Manhattan location.

restaurants.name: Fat Ronnie's Burger Bar
restaurants.address: 303 6th Ave, New York, NY 10014, USA
restaurants.note: Martha's Vineyard import. Thick patties, fish sandwiches, chopped cheese. Harlem family legacy.

restaurants.name: Bar Chucho
restaurants.address: 37 Market St, New York, NY 10002, USA
restaurants.note: From Corima team. Cantina bar with cocktails, micheladas, queso chihuahua burger. Opening April 2.

restaurants.name: After Eden
restaurants.address: 162 Orchard St, New York, NY 10002, USA
restaurants.note: Vietnamese coffee by day, SE Asian cocktails at night. Osamil/Hwaro vet. Opening April.

restaurants.name: Oriana
restaurants.address: 174 Mott St, New York, NY 10012, USA
restaurants.note: Noortwyck team's 80-seat Nolita spot. Wood-fired grill, 7000-bottle cellar. Opening May.

restaurants.name: Good Time Country Buffet
restaurants.address: 166 1st Ave, New York, NY 10009, USA
restaurants.note: From Kisa + C as in Charlie team. Fried chicken, collards, Southern buffet concept. Opening spring.

restaurants.name: Dean's
restaurants.address: 213 6th Ave, New York, NY 10014, USA
restaurants.note: From King team (Annie Shi + Jess Shadbolt). Stargazy pie, Guinness, sticky pudding. Opened March 31.

restaurants.name: Strange Delight
restaurants.address: 63 Lafayette Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11217, USA
restaurants.note: Modern oyster bar near BAM. Brooklyn-New Orleans vibe, great fried shrimp, cocktails. Jim's pick.

restaurants.name: Strange Delight
restaurants.address: 63 Lafayette Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11217, USA

restaurants.name: Vato

restaurants.notes: From the Corima (Michelin-starred) team. Sourdough tortillas, burritos, pastries

restaurants.name: FOLK

restaurants.name: Leland Eating and Drinking House

restaurants.source: BK Mag, Resy Hit List Mar 2026
restaurants.notes: Mediterranean + Chinese/Filipino. Focaccia, smoked pollock fritters, chicken jook, whole fried black sea bass

restaurants.address: 791 Washington Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11238, USA

restaurants.name: Zimmi's

restaurants.name: Mommy Pai’s
restaurants.address: 203 Mott St, New York, NY 10012, USA
restaurants.notes: Vegan Filet-o-Fish riff — fried tofu, nam prik noom, dairy-free American cheese on Tom Cat bun

restaurants.name: Santo Taco
restaurants.address: 114 Kenmare St, New York, NY 10012, USA
restaurants.notes: Sirloin trompo tacos. Part of NYC's taco 'watershed year'

restaurants.name: Taqueria El Chato
restaurants.address: 620 Manhattan Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11222, USA
restaurants.notes: Expanding taco spot. Lo Times watershed taco year mention

preferences.brooklyn_weighting: Favor West and Central Brooklyn (Fort Greene, Park Slope, Crown Heights, Prospect Heights, Bed-Stuy, Gowanus, Sunset Park, etc.) over North Brooklyn and Williamsburg. Jim lives in Brooklyn.
